store.name: R.E.P.O.
store.short_description: An online co-op horror game with up to 6 players. Locate valuable, fully physics-based objects and handle them with care as you retrieve and extract to satisfy your creator's desires.
store.short_description_en: An online co-op horror game with up to 6 players. Locate valuable, fully physics-based objects and handle them with care as you retrieve and extract to satisfy your creator's desires.
categories: 无需应对快速反应事件

store.name: Lethal Company
store.short_description: A co-op horror about scavenging at abandoned moons to sell scrap to the Company.
store.short_description_en: A co-op horror about scavenging at abandoned moons to sell scrap to the Company.

store.name: 前方高能
store.short_description: 录下好友的惊悚作死镜头，一跃成为“幽哩幽哩”的顶流巨星！（强烈建议开黑游玩）
store.short_description_en: Film your friends doing scary things to become SpöökTube famous! (strongly advised to not go alone)

store.name: FEEDERS
store.short_description: 2079年。太阳爆炸了。有钱人逃到地底。你被送到最顶层，那里的天空在燃烧。他们叫你顶楼老鼠。下去那些废墟，里面爬满了独特怪物。发出声音，一种来追你。保持沉默，另一种找到你。1-4人合作恐怖游戏。
store.short_description_en: 2079. The sun exploded. The rich fled underground. You were sent to the top, where the sky burns. They call you Penthouse Rats. Descend into ruins crawling with smart, unique creatures. Make noise, one hunts you. Stay silent, another finds you. 1-4 player co-op horror.

store.name: PEAK
store.short_description: 《PEAK》是一款需要细致合作的登山游戏，作为流落神秘岛屿的童子军探险家，无论单人独闯抑或团队协力，你们唯一获救的希望便是登上岛中那座巍峨的山峰，自然荒野险途漫漫，稍有不慎便会大难临头。顶峰在望，你有魄力能征服它吗？
store.short_description_en: PEAK is a co-op climbing game where the slightest mistake can spell your doom. Either solo or as a group of lost nature scouts, your only hope of rescue from a mysterious island is to scale the mountain at its center. Do you have what it takes to reach the PEAK?

store.name: Phasmophobia 恐鬼症
store.short_description: Phasmophobia is a 4 player online co-op psychological horror. Paranormal activity is on the rise and it’s up to you and your team to use all the ghost-hunting equipment at your disposal in order to gather as much evidence as you can.
store.short_description_en: Phasmophobia is a 4 player online co-op psychological horror. Paranormal activity is on the rise and it’s up to you and your team to use all the ghost-hunting equipment at your disposal in order to gather as much evidence as you can.
categories: 无需应对快速反应事件

store.name: Demonologist
store.short_description: 恶魔学家是一款合作式恐怖游戏，可由至少1名和最多4名玩家一起玩。你的目标是识别被诅咒的地方的恶灵类型，并使用你的设备将其驱除，无论是单独还是与你的团队合作。
store.short_description_en: Demonologist is a Co-Op horror game that can be played with at least 1 and up to 4 players. Your goal is to identify the type of evil spirit in cursed places and exorcise it using your equipment, either alone or with your team.

store.name: The Outlast Trials
store.short_description: Red Barrels invites you to experience mind-numbing terror, this time with friends. Whether you go through the trials alone or in teams, if you survive long enough and complete the therapy, Murkoff will happily let you leave… but will you be the same?
store.short_description_en: Red Barrels invites you to experience mind-numbing terror, this time with friends. Whether you go through the trials alone or in teams, if you survive long enough and complete the therapy, Murkoff will happily let you leave… but will you be the same?

store.name: 猎杀：对决 1896
store.short_description: 《猎杀：对决 1896》是一款硬核高回报的撤离式射击游戏。追踪畸变怪物，在残酷的PvP对抗中生还。深入被历史遗忘的腐化荒泽，夺取悬赏赏金。组队协作，才能求得生存。一无所有葬身荒野，或是满载物资全身而退，都在一念之间。
store.short_description_en: Hunt: Showdown 1896 is the brutally rewarding extraction shooter. Track twisted monsters and overcome ruthless PvP. Take bounties in corrupted backwaters lost to history. With a team, you might survive. Die with nothing or get out with everything.

store.name: 永劫无间
store.short_description: 风靡全球的中式竞技大作！来这里舞利刃、端火枪，享受远近结合的华丽战斗！驾驭风沙、机甲，化身野兽、大佛，体验风格迥异的英雄能力！
store.short_description_en: Dive into the legends of the Far East in NARAKA: BLADEPOINT; team up with friends in fast-paced melee fights for a Battle Royale experience unlike any other. Find your playstyle with a varied cast of heroes with unique skills. More than 40 million players have already joined the fray, play free now!

store.name: 灰境行者
store.name_en: Rules of Engagement: The Grey State
store.short_description: 欢迎来到《灰境行者》，一款全新的战术射击RPG。你将操控“行者”仿生体进入神秘的“灰境”，面对扭曲的怪物与其他小队，打造你的专属构筑，杀出重围，满载而归！ 记住：一切恐怖，皆是财富。
store.short_description_en: A new gold rush has begun. In this Tactical RPG Shooter, you are a Strider, an elite operative sent into the Grey State to retrieve priceless artifacts. Craft your own build, survive nightmarish creatures and rival squads, and get paid. This isn't about saving the world. It's just business.

store.name: HAUNTED: Escape the Dollhouse
store.short_description: 一名玩家调查神秘的玩偶屋，而朋友们则被困其中。支持2至4名玩家的合作超自然调查游戏。分享线索、破解灵异谜题，并在队友给出离谱指挥时努力保持冷静。
store.short_description_en: One player investigates a mysterious dollhouse while their friends are trapped inside it. A chaotic and highly replayable co-op paranormal investigation for 2–4 players. Share clues, solve occult puzzles, and try not to panic when your friends give terrible directions.
categories: 无需应对快速反应事件

store.name: The Reflection
store.short_description: The Reflection is a ritual-based co-op horror game focused on tension, teamwork, and survival. Trapped inside a cursed mansion, players must a investigate supernatural event, perform the correct rituals, and exorcise a dangerous entity before it consumes them.
store.short_description_en: The Reflection is a ritual-based co-op horror game focused on tension, teamwork, and survival. Trapped inside a cursed mansion, players must a investigate supernatural event, perform the correct rituals, and exorcise a dangerous entity before it consumes them.

store.name: Radio Decay
store.short_description: 这是一款最多支持1至6人合作的生存恐怖游戏，背景设定在一个超自然的核末日世界。玩家将深入被遗弃的城市，提取放射性物质，同时在各种虫形畸变体的追猎下努力生存。用义肢重塑逐渐腐败的身体，武装自己，并通过无线电呼叫好友来帮忙。
store.short_description_en: A 1-6 player co-op survival horror set in a supernatural nuclear apocalypse. Drop-pod into an abandoned city to extract radioactive artifacts while being hunted by giant bug-like monsters. Rebuild your decaying body with prosthetic limbs, arm yourself, and radio your friends for help.
categories: 无需应对快速反应事件

store.name: In Us
store.short_description: 恶魔，就行走于我们之中——戴着人类的面孔。 揭穿它们。祓除它们。与同伴，并肩。
store.short_description_en: The devil wears a human face. Unmask and exorcise it—with friends. A 4-player co-op horror game where you hunt demons lurking in a village. Observe behavior, detect environmental shifts, and use items to expose the truth. But beware: should you misjudge, the consequences will be severe.

store.name: Carnival Hunt
store.short_description: Carnival Hunt is an asymmetric multiplayer horror game set inside a living, ever-shifting mechanical carnival designed by the Puppetmaster. One player becomes the Carnival Monster, while others play as puppet Bunnies struggling to survive, ascend, and escape the hunt.
store.short_description_en: Carnival Hunt is an asymmetric multiplayer horror game set inside a living, ever-shifting mechanical carnival designed by the Puppetmaster. One player becomes the Carnival Monster, while others play as puppet Bunnies struggling to survive, ascend, and escape the hunt.

store.name: Halloween: The Game
store.short_description: 1978 年的万圣节之夜，没人能从迈克尔·迈尔斯的手中逃脱。在 Halloween 中，化身“面具杀手”，或者直面邪恶奋起反抗。
store.short_description_en: On Halloween night, 1978, no one is safe from Michael Myers. Become the Boogeyman or fight back against the face of evil itself in Halloween.

store.name: The Mound: Omen of Cthulhu
store.short_description: 最多可四人合作，组建探险者小队，踏上寻宝之旅。这片被诅咒的丛林危机四伏，怪物扭曲了现实。保持冷静，在丛林吞噬你之前征服它……
store.short_description_en: In up to four player co-op, form a group of explorers searching for treasure. In this cursed jungle, danger is everywhere and monstrous creatures alter reality. Stay clear-headed and tame the jungle before it devours you…
categories: 无需应对快速反应事件

store.name: MECCHA CHAMELEON
store.short_description: 把自己涂满颜色，融入背景吧！《Meccha Chameleon》是一款全新感觉的捉迷藏游戏，玩家需要在自己纯白的身体上绘图以拟态成关卡中的样子。躲藏地点、姿势，以及最重要的“画功”是生存的关键。用连变色龙都自愧不如的技术欺骗追捕者的眼睛，在时限内逃出生天吧！您还可以轻松享受随机匹配或观众参与型直播。
store.short_description_en: Paint yourself to blend in! "Meccha Chameleon" is a new-sensation hide-and-seek game where you paint your white body to mimic the stage. Spot, pose, and "artistic skill" are keys to survival. Deceive Seekers with techniques that put chameleons to shame! Supports public matches and streaming.
categories: 无需应对快速反应事件

store.name: HELLDIVERS™ 2
store.short_description: 银河系最后的进攻力量。投入这款紧张刺激且疯狂的第三人称射击游戏，应征成为绝地潜兵，穿越战火肆虐的星系，为自由而战。
store.short_description_en: The Galaxy’s Last Line of Offence. Enlist in the Helldivers and join the fight for freedom across a hostile galaxy in a fast, frantic, and ferocious third-person shooter.
categories: 无需应对快速反应事件

store.name: 遥遥西土 Far Far West
store.short_description: 大吼咿哈快上马，西部牛仔英姿飒！《遥遥西土》是一款热闹非凡的4人合作射击游戏，你将踏上西行旅途，一路斩妖杀怪、施法念咒、完成任务、领取赏金。召集队友，完成任务，然后趁你还活着（大多数时候）赶紧拿钱走人。
store.short_description_en: Yee-haw, Cowboys! Team up in this chaotic 1-4 player co-op shooter. Journey to the Far Far West to blast monsters, sling spells, complete missions, and collect bounties. Work as a team to get in, get paid and get out (mostly) alive.
categories: 无需应对快速反应事件

store.name: 地精捣蛋团
store.short_description: 这是一款在线合作游戏，你将化身为一只小地精，闯入民宅制造混乱。躲避各种危险，改造偷来的家居物品，通过完成任务满足地精王的要求。制作装备并升级家园——让任务越做越顺手，捣蛋越来越成功。
store.short_description_en: An online Co-op game about breaking into houses and causing havoc as a tiny gnome. Avoid danger, repurpose stolen household items, and complete tasks to meet the High-Gnome’s demands. Craft equipment and upgrade your home to make your missions easier and more successful.
categories: 无需应对快速反应事件

store.name: 一起开火车2：汽笛重鸣
store.short_description: 《一起开火车》的续作来啦！快呼朋唤友再建铁轨重鸣汽笛吧！更多特色鲜明的地理环境，升级角色和引擎，选择脑洞大开的全新路线；在火车脱轨前，快将你自定义的关卡设计分享给更多轨道爱好者吧！
store.short_description_en: The chaotic co-op railroad construction game is back! Team up with your friends to build a railroad through procedurally generated worlds with new biomes and bosses. Permanently upgrade your character and engine, even create your own levels - just don‘t let your train derail!

store.name: 失落城堡2
store.short_description: 失落城堡2是一款2D卡通横版Rogue-Lite游戏。探寻丰富宝物道具强化自己，精通各类武器玩出花样，挑战强大魔物展现实力。新的冒险正召唤着宝藏猎人们！
store.short_description_en: "Lost Castle 2" is a 2D Beat'em up Rogue-Lite game. Explore abundant treasures and items to enhance yourself, master various weapons to showcase your skills, and challenge powerful monsters to demonstrate your strength. A new adventure is calling for treasure hunters!

store.name: 深岩银河
store.short_description: 《深岩银河》是一款多人合作类第一人称射击游戏，有着了不起的矮人、100% 可破坏的地形、由程序生成的洞穴以及无数的外星怪物。
store.short_description_en: Deep Rock Galactic is a 1-4 player co-op FPS featuring dwarven space miners, procedurally-generated destructible environments, and endless hordes of alien monsters. Explore cave systems, mine for minerals, and work together to survive!
categories: 无需应对快速反应事件

store.name: Among Us
store.short_description: 这是一款可以连线或本地游玩的派对游戏，4 到 15 名玩家相互合作与背叛... 一切都发生在太空之中！
store.short_description_en: An online and local party game of teamwork and betrayal for 4-15 players...in space!

store.name: Sons Of The Forest
store.short_description: 你被派到了一座孤岛上，寻找一位失踪的亿万富翁，结果却发现自己深陷被食人生物占领的炼狱之地。你需要制作工具和武器、建造房屋，倾尽全力生存下去，无论独自一人还是与朋友一起——一切尽在这款新推出的开放世界恐怖生存模拟游戏中。
store.short_description_en: Sent to find a missing billionaire on a remote island, you find yourself in a cannibal-infested hellscape. Craft, build, and struggle to survive, alone or with friends, in this terrifying new open-world survival horror simulator.

store.name: 雨中冒险 2
store.short_description: 浴血奋战杀出暴戾的怪物重围，在混乱的外星球上逃过劫难。可孤军奋战，也可与好友并肩作战。 以出人意料的方式合成战利品，同时精通每个角色，直至您自己成为初次迫降时曾颇为惧怕的恐怖威胁。
store.short_description_en: Escape a chaotic alien planet by fighting through hordes of frenzied monsters – with your friends, or on your own. Combine loot in surprising ways and master each character until you become the havoc you feared upon your first crash landing.

store.name: 风中行者
store.short_description: 《风中行者》作为《死亡细胞》团队的全新力作，是一款节奏飞快的类 Rogue 动作游戏，支持 1–3 人联机。闯入崩毁的世界，一路畅快突进、俯冲、破坏。自由搭配装备，发动威力惊人的特殊攻击，成为抵御大气旋最后的防线。
store.short_description_en: A lightning-fast 1–3 player co-op roguelite from the creators of Dead Cells. DASH, DIVE and DESTROY across a shattered world. Build wild loadouts, unleash devastating Alterattacks, and become the last stand against the Vortex.

store.name: 青蛙小队🐸 / Frog Sqwad
store.short_description: 🐸这是一款最多支持8人合作的撤离式解谜平台游戏。你可以摆荡、跳跃、把朋友弹射出去，还能一路吃吃吃，长成超大巨蛙。快和蛙蛙伙伴组队，在下水道横冲直撞，为沼泽之王的荣耀而战吧！🐸
store.short_description_en: 🐸Up to 8 player co-op extraction puzzle-platformer where you swing, jump, catapult your friends, and eat eat EAT until you grow into a humongous Megafrog. Squad up with your frog friends and storm the Sewers for the glory of the Swamp King!🐸
categories: 无需应对快速反应事件

store.name: Garry's Mod
store.short_description: Garry's Mod is a physics sandbox. There aren't any predefined aims or goals. We give you the tools and leave you to play.
store.short_description_en: Garry's Mod is a physics sandbox. There aren't any predefined aims or goals. We give you the tools and leave you to play.
categories: 无需应对快速反应事件
已启用 Valve 反作弊保护

store.name: Crab Game
store.short_description: Crab Game is a First-Person Multiplayer game where you play through several different minigames based on children's games, until only one player stands victorious.
store.short_description_en: Crab Game is a First-Person Multiplayer game where you play through several different minigames based on children's games, until only one player stands victorious.

store.name: 黎明杀机
store.short_description: 10年恐惧相伴。10年的惊吓与刺激体验。10年的残暴献祭与惊险逃脱。 永久困于邪恶的幻境之中，即使死亡也无法逃脱，这是一场需要勇气和智慧的较量，四名意志坚定的逃生者在残忍对局中面对嗜血杀手。选择一方，进入多人非对称竞技游戏世界，获得最佳恐怖游戏体验。
store.short_description_en: 10 years of horror. 10 years of jump scares and close calls. 10 years of brutal sacrifices and thrilling escapes. Trapped forever in a realm of eldritch evil where even death is not an escape, four determined Survivors face a bloodthirsty Killer in a vicious game of nerve and wits.
categories: Steam 输入 API 支持

store.name: Dear Passengers
store.short_description: Play in co-op as the crew of the world’s worst airline. Your plane is falling apart, your cargo is illegal, and passenger safety barely makes the list.
store.short_description_en: Play in co-op as the crew of the world’s worst airline. Your plane is falling apart, your cargo is illegal, and passenger safety barely makes the list.
